customLists.title: CUSTOM LISTS
customLists.emptyDescription: You haven't created any custom lists yet.

records.emptyDescription: Looks like your list is empty.
records.searchEmptyDescription: No records found matching your search.

about.description: Listify is a personal media tracker built around one idea: your collection should be simple to maintain, always accessible, and entirely yours. Whether you're logging games you've finished, films on your watchlist, books you're reading, or anything in between — Listify keeps it organized without getting in the way.
about.step1: Sign up and create your personal Listify account.
about.step2: Add and manage records from any device — desktop or mobile.
about.step3: Use built-in categories or create custom lists for anything that doesn't fit the defaults.
about.dataDescription: Your collection lives on our servers, but it belongs to you. Listify supports full data portability — export your entire collection as a {format1} or {format2} file at any time. Use it for backups, migration, or just keeping a local copy in your favorite spreadsheet software.
about.privacy: No tracking, no ads, no third-party data sharing.
about.openSource: Open-source — inspect, fork, or self-host the entire project.
about.communityDescription: Listify is an actively developed open-source project. New features, categories, and quality-of-life improvements are added regularly. If you have an idea, found a bug, or just want to say hello — reach out via {link1} or {link2}. Contributions are always welcome.
about.thankYou: Thank you for using Listify — and for being part of what it's becoming.
